message:
refactor(mcp): extract 3 event mutation tools from mcp.rs to mcp_tools.rs [ft-1fv0u]

Move WaEventsAnnotateTool, WaEventsTriageTool, WaEventsLabelTool implementations
from the monolithic mcp.rs to mcp_tools.rs as part of the MCP strangler fig
migration. All 29 ToolHandler impls now live in mcp_tools.rs (0 remain in mcp.rs).
Param types and shared helpers stay in mcp.rs, accessed via `use super::*`.

mcp.rs: 4745 → 4301 lines (-444)
mcp_tools.rs: 3631 → 4078 lines (+447)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
